highlights: state.json collab.counts is written ONCE at metaswarm init (bin/stampede.sh:825) as {proposals:0, reviews:0, improvements:0, consensus:0, broadcasts:0} and never updated thereafter
Live ledger truth (wc -l on RUN_DIR/collab/*.jsonl): proposals=5, reviews=11, improvements=7, consensus=5, broadcasts=4 (32 total events) — but state.json still reports all zeros

No update_state / patch_state / re-write of collab.counts exists anywhere in bin/stampede.sh post-init; the only later state.json write is the teardown phase update at line 350-359 which does not touch collab
stampede-monitor.sh:57-66 (print_collab_summary) computes the live dashboard via count_jsonl_lines directly on the JSONL files, NOT from state.json — so the user-visible monitor is correct
skills/SKILL.md contains no reference to 'collab' or 'counts'; no doc/agent treats state.json collab.counts as a live source
Effectively by-design: counts field is a one-shot init artifact (schema scaffold), live truth lives in the append-only JSONL ledgers as required by the filesystem-as-IPC convention
gaps: Stale counts field is misleading: any external tool/script that reads state.json collab.counts will see permanent zeros despite 32 real events — a latent footgun
No comment in stampede.sh:820-826 documenting that counts is init-only; future contributors may assume it's live
No tombstone/derived flag (e.g., counts: null or counts_source: 'wc -l ledgers') to signal the field is not maintained

highlights: Collab display is gated by is_metaswarm_run(): present BASE/collab returns true, otherwise fleet.json is parsed for profile=metaswarm or role=commander.
Live collab state exists and all five JSONL ledgers currently parse cleanly: proposals=5, reviews=11, improvements=7, consensus=5, broadcasts=4.
If collab/ is absent, metaswarm runs still show a zero-count Collab row when fleet.json identifies commanders; non-metaswarm/missing or invalid fleet suppresses it gracefully.
gaps: count_jsonl_lines uses wc -l, so it counts newline characters, not valid JSONL records: empty files count 0, trailing newlines are fine, but a final record without newline is undercounted and malformed partial lines ending in newline are overcounted.

Monitor never JSON-parses collab ledger contents; it cannot detect invalid schema, malformed records, duplicate events, wrong run/commander IDs, stale phases, quorum/consensus quality, or failed adoption.
No adopt phase is displayed; protocol exposes only proposals/reviews/improvements/consensus/broadcasts ledgers, so propose->peer_review->improve->consensus->broadcast is visible but adopt is absent.

Commander nested progress shows squads/workers/run/done/fail/atoms/heartbeat/phase from per-commander swarm-state.json, but no per-commander collab ledger counts or collab health. Collab counts are global only.

highlights: bin/stampede-merge.sh has ZERO references to collab/, consensus, broadcasts, proposals, or adopted items
agents/stampede-merger.agent.md Load Context reads only results/*.json, fleet.json, runtime-stats.json — no collab awareness
skills/SKILL.md synthesis (lines 570-660) iterates results/*.json only — never reads collab/ ledgers or bundle consensus fields
bin/stampede.sh line 1013 instructs commanders to include adopted_consensus_item_ids in bundle.json, but no downstream consumer reads them
32 lines of real collab data exist in this run (5 proposals, 11 reviews, 7 improvements, 5 consensus, 4 broadcasts) — all silently discarded
gaps: stampede-merge.sh does not pass any collab content into the merger agent prompt
stampede-merger.agent.md has no instructions to read collab/*.jsonl or validate source_refs
SKILL.md synthesis step does not consume adopted_consensus from bundles or collab ledgers
Bundle Shape in stampede-commander.agent.md defines a consensus field but no reader exists
No code path anywhere in merge/synthesis reads broadcasts.jsonl or consensus.jsonl
Commander-002 has no bundle.json yet, so even if a reader existed it would find nothing to consume

highlights: protocol defines 6 phases but protocol.json exposes no adopt ledger/event; adoption is only hinted via stampede.sh prompt text and ad-hoc broadcast/bundle prose
broadcast records are inconsistent: broadcasts.jsonl line 3 omits required evidence and uses adopted_items instead of consensus_item_id
consensus->broadcast->adopt is not fully traceable from ledgers alone; no forward pointer from consensus to broadcasts and no dedicated adoption ledger
gaps: No adopt ledger file exists under collab/ despite protocol workflow including adopt
stampede-commander.agent.md has no consume_broadcasts step; collab workflow is injected by launcher prompt, not the agent contract
Bundle shape in stampede-commander.agent.md omits adopted_consensus_item_ids/source_refs required by bin/stampede.sh prompt
Post-run auditors cannot verify item-by-item adoption from ledgers alone

highlights: mark_run_blocked() atomically updates state.json via .tmp rename; preserves ledger integrity
Collab ledgers preserved on block: 32 lines total (5 proposals, 11 reviews, 7 improvements, 5 consensus, 4 broadcasts) intact
mark_run_blocked() appends commander_blocked event to child-agents.jsonl for each commander
do_teardown() sets phase=torn_down (NOT status=stopped) — semantic inconsistency
protocol.json correctly instructs readers to tolerate malformed trailing lines
gaps: NO --resume support: grep returns zero matches; blocked runs cannot be reattached
do_teardown() does NOT drain in-flight writers before killing PIDs — partial writes possible
mark_run_blocked() does NOT append run_blocked event to collab ledgers (proposals/broadcasts)
count_jsonl_lines uses wc -l: partial final lines count as 0 bytes but still return a count — no graceful handling
Teardown kills workers synchronously before state update; no SIGTERM grace period for writers

state_json_collab_counts.summary: collab.counts in state.json initialized to all-zeros at metaswarm launch and never updated at runtime; monitor reads live counts from JSONL ledgers via wc -l instead, so dashboard is accurate but state.json field is stale and misleading for external readers
evidence: bin/stampede.sh:820-826 (collab dict literal with counts={name:0 for name in ledger_events})
bin/stampede.sh:827-843 (single write_json_atomic of state.json at init; no later collab writes)
bin/stampede.sh:350-359 (teardown updates state.json phase only, not collab)
bin/stampede-monitor.sh:57-66 (live counts via count_jsonl_lines, bypasses state.json)
RUN_DIR/state.json collab.counts == all zeros (verified)
wc -l RUN_DIR/collab/*.jsonl: proposals 5, reviews 11, improvements 7, consensus 5, broadcasts 4
grep 'collab' on bin/stampede.sh shows no increment/update logic post line 841
grep 'collab|counts' on skills/SKILL.md: no matches

monitor_display.summary: print_collab_summary() correctly reads 5 live JSONL ledgers via wc -l; no JSON parsing of content; adopt phase has no ledger and no monitor display; per-commander collab counts absent; graceful on missing files; trailing-partial-line risk present
evidence: bin/stampede-monitor.sh:32-39 wc -l based count_jsonl_lines
bin/stampede-monitor.sh:41-55 is_metaswarm_run collab-dir/fleet fallback
bin/stampede-monitor.sh:57-66 print_collab_summary counts five ledgers only
bin/stampede-monitor.sh:143-193 commander nested display excludes collab counts
live collab/: proposals=5 reviews=11 improvements=7 consensus=5 broadcasts=4; parsed_records match and bad=0
collab/protocol.json ledgers list five events: proposal, peer_review, improvement, consensus, broadcast

synthesis_consumption.summary: Synthesis pipeline (stampede-merge.sh, stampede-merger.agent.md, SKILL.md) is entirely blind to all collab ledgers; launcher instructs commanders to include adopted_consensus in bundle.json but no downstream code reads or validates those fields; entire collab workflow output is silently discarded at synthesis
evidence: bin/stampede-merge.sh: grep for collab|consensus|broadcast|adopted returns 0 matches
agents/stampede-merger.agent.md: grep for collab|consensus|broadcast|adopted returns 0 matches
skills/SKILL.md: grep for collab|consensus|broadcast|adopted returns 0 matches
bin/stampede.sh:1013 — commander prompt says include adopted consensus item_ids in bundle.json
agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:270 — Bundle Shape has consensus.tier and consensus.notes fields
.stampede/run-20260430-180646/collab/ — 32 lines across 5 ledger files (real data exists)
commanders/commander-002/ — no bundle.json present

adoption_broadcast_mechanics.summary: No dedicated adopt ledger or adopt event type defined in protocol.json; adoption tracked only via bundle.json prose per launcher prompt injection; broadcasts.jsonl has missing required_fields in some records; consensus-to-broadcast-to-adopt chain is not fully reconstructable from ledgers alone; stampede-commander.agent.md lacks consume_broadcasts step
evidence: collab/protocol.json:5-25,37-57
collab/broadcasts.jsonl:1-4 (line 3 missing evidence; uses adopted_items)
collab/consensus.jsonl:1-5 (no broadcast pointer; line 5 missing evidence)
bin/stampede.sh:1013-1014
agents/stampede-commander.agent.md:41-61,254-282

recovery.summary: mark_run_blocked() preserves ledger data atomically and appends commander_blocked to child-agents.jsonl but does NOT append a run_blocked event to collab ledgers; no --resume flag; do_teardown kills PIDs synchronously risking in-flight partial-line corruption; wc -l count_jsonl_lines is vulnerable to partial final lines
evidence: stampede.sh:141-195 mark_run_blocked() — atomic state update, child-agents.jsonl append
stampede.sh:306-364 do_teardown() — kills PIDs, then sets phase=torn_down, no drain logic
stampede-monitor.sh count_jsonl_lines() — simple wc -l, no partial-line detection
collab/protocol.json:29-34 — atomic_append_guidance acknowledges malformed trailing lines
state.json shows status=blocked, ledger counts all 0 in state but files have 32 lines total
grep --resume returns no matches in stampede.sh

gaps: state.json collab.counts never refreshed post-init; stale zeros mislead external readers
No adopt ledger or adopt event type in protocol.json; adoption is prose-only
Synthesis/merge pipeline fully blind to all collab ledgers and adopted_consensus fields
broadcasts.jsonl records missing required evidence field; protocol conformance inconsistent
consensus→broadcast→adopt chain not reconstructable from ledgers alone (no forward pointers)
stampede-commander.agent.md has zero collab-bus or adopt/broadcast workflow instructions
No --resume support; blocked run cannot restart without losing in-progress state
do_teardown does not drain in-flight collab writers; partial-line corruption risk
Monitor displays collab only as global counts; no per-commander collab breakdown
adopt phase not reflected anywhere in monitor or synthesis output
